item.title: Bitcoin And | Bitcoin & Economic News – Jack Spirko Interview | Bitcoin And Revisited
item.description:
Jack Spirko Interview | Bitcoin And Revisited

Bitcoin And Revisited is where I go back through the archives and rerun older interviews that still have something worth hearing today. These conversations may come from earlier days of the show, but the edges I was exploring—Bitcoin, resilience, permaculture, education, podcasting, and culture—still have a way of staying relevant.

In this episode, I sat down with Jack Spirko, host of The Survival Podcast, for a wide-ranging conversation on systems thinking, Bitcoin, permaculture, preparedness, podcasting, and the strange overlap between people who want sound money and people who want resilient lives. Jack is not the bunker-and-MRE caricature of “survivalism.” He is a practical, systems-minded thinker who helped push me over the line into finally buying Bitcoin. 


Topics Covered 


  • The overlap between Bitcoiners, preparedness, and regenerative agriculture
  • Permaculture as systems-level design science
  • Turning poor land into productive land with ducks, trees, swales, and patience
  • Why weeds are not always enemies; sometimes they are messages
  • Edge effect in ecology, Bitcoin, commerce, podcasting, and community
  • Preparedness without the bunker fantasy
  • Food storage, backup power, sanitation, security, and personal risk assessment
  • Why resiliency matters more than paranoia
  • Podcasting as a craft, business, and escape hatch from corporate life
  • Sphinx Chat, Lightning, and streaming sats for value-for-value podcasting

Key Takeaways
 
  • Bitcoin and permaculture may look like different worlds, but both deal with time preference, fragility, resilience, and systems design.
  • Preparedness is not about fantasy collapse scenarios. It is about building redundancy into everyday life.
  • Nature repairs damage if you learn how to observe and cooperate with it.
  • Abundance often appears at the edge where two systems meet.
  • The best security plan is not chest-thumping. It is good decisions, good neighbors, proper procedures, and not being where trouble is.
  • Independent media becomes stronger when listeners can send value directly to creators.

Guest Links
 
  • The Survival Podcast: thesurvivalpodcast.com
  • Short URL: tspc.co
  • Contact: jack@thesurvivalpodcast.com

Support the Show
 
Support Bitcoin And through Sphinx Chat by streaming sats while you listen. Join the tribe, send a few sats, and participate in the value-for-value model that lets listeners support podcasters directly over the Lightning Network.

https://www.bitcoinandshow.com/the-comfrey-owners-manual-is-here/

item.itunes:summary:
Jack Spirko Interview | Bitcoin And Revisited

Bitcoin And Revisited is where I go back through the archives and rerun older interviews that still have something worth hearing today. These conversations may come from earlier days of the show, but the edges I was exploring—Bitcoin, resilience, permaculture, education, podcasting, and culture—still have a way of staying relevant.

In this episode, I sat down with Jack Spirko, host of The Survival Podcast, for a wide-ranging conversation on systems thinking, Bitcoin, permaculture, preparedness, podcasting, and the strange overlap between people who want sound money and people who want resilient lives. Jack is not the bunker-and-MRE caricature of “survivalism.” He is a practical, systems-minded thinker who helped push me over the line into finally buying Bitcoin. 


Topics Covered 


  • The overlap between Bitcoiners, preparedness, and regenerative agriculture
  • Permaculture as systems-level design science
  • Turning poor land into productive land with ducks, trees, swales, and patience
  • Why weeds are not always enemies; sometimes they are messages
  • Edge effect in ecology, Bitcoin, commerce, podcasting, and community
  • Preparedness without the bunker fantasy
  • Food storage, backup power, sanitation, security, and personal risk assessment
  • Why resiliency matters more than paranoia
  • Podcasting as a craft, business, and escape hatch from corporate life
  • Sphinx Chat, Lightning, and streaming sats for value-for-value podcasting

Key Takeaways
 
  • Bitcoin and permaculture may look like different worlds, but both deal with time preference, fragility, resilience, and systems design.
  • Preparedness is not about fantasy collapse scenarios. It is about building redundancy into everyday life.
  • Nature repairs damage if you learn how to observe and cooperate with it.
  • Abundance often appears at the edge where two systems meet.
  • The best security plan is not chest-thumping. It is good decisions, good neighbors, proper procedures, and not being where trouble is.
  • Independent media becomes stronger when listeners can send value directly to creators.

Guest Links
 
  • The Survival Podcast: thesurvivalpodcast.com
  • Short URL: tspc.co
  • Contact: jack@thesurvivalpodcast.com

Support the Show
 
Support Bitcoin And through Sphinx Chat by streaming sats while you listen. Join the tribe, send a few sats, and participate in the value-for-value model that lets listeners support podcasters directly over the Lightning Network.

item.title: The Bitcoin Standard Podcast – 325. Principles of Economics Lecture 14: Credit and Banking
item.description:
Fourteenth lecture of Principles of Economics explores credit and banking as the institutions that channel savings into investment, how commodity credit emerges from real savings, while circulation credit comes from money creation, why interest rates reflect time preference, and whether interest can be eliminated with hard money.

Get all course notes and slides on saifedean.com/poecourse

]]>

item.description:
In this episode, Vince and Joel Hodlman discuss Bitcoin investing strategies, market outlook, and the implications of recent legislation like the Clarity Act. They explore the impact of treasury companies, the importance of self-custody, and share insights on timing the market and long-term wealth building. They also discuss Kevin Warsh and potential for lower interest rates.

item.title: Once Bitten! A Bitcoin Podcast. – Bitcoin For Organisations - My First Bitcoin - James Dewar, David Pool, Darren Freemantle. #609
item.description:
A strategic guide to risk, opportunity and adoption!

$ BTC 78,461

Block Height 949,622

Today's guests are James Dewar, David Pool, and Darren Fremantle who join me to discuss their new "Bitcoin for Organisations" project, an open-source educational resource designed to help businesses understand Bitcoin as a critical risk management imperative.

Key Topics:

  • Introduction to the "Bitcoin for Organisations" idea
  • Backgrounds and expertise of guests James Dewar, Darren Fremantle, and David Paul
  • Framing Bitcoin as a crucial risk management issue for businesses
  • The role of Bitcoin and Lightning in enabling "agentic payments" for AI
  • Distinguishing Bitcoin from the broader "crypto" industry
  • Challenges in educating traditional finance and corporate entities about Bitcoin
  • Successes in engaging risk, compliance, legal, and academic sectors
  • The open-source nature and collaborative development of the material
  • Specific industry verticals and internal functions addressed in the materials
  • Strategies for dispelling common myths and FUD surrounding Bitcoin
  • The potential for "sleeper Bitcoiners" to advocate for adoption within their organisations
  • The future landscape of fiat currency, central banks, and Bitcoin coexistence

Connections:

James Dewar - @Bitcoinshire

David Pool - @exitingfiat

Darren Freemantle - @freemantledj

@MyFirstBitcoin_

My First Bitcoin website:

,https://programs.myfirstbitcoin.org/programs/bitcoin-for-organizations/

item.title: The Mustard Seed Bitcoin Podcast – Coffeezilla vs 11%+ Digital Credit Yields and Why Bitcoin is Ready To Run | Joe Consorti
item.description:
Bitcoin is evolving into a unique asset that responds to both crisis and liquidity expansion. In this conversation, we break down how macro policy, market structure, and institutional flows are reshaping bitcoin’s role in global portfolios. The result is a shift toward bitcoin as a core asset for long-term capital allocation.


Timestamps:

0:00 Introduction and current bitcoin market setup

0:23 Price levels, resistance, and defining a new bull market

1:30 Macro backdrop: war, uncertainty, and market reactions

2:40 Bitcoin as chaos insurance across global crises

4:00 Performance vs gold, S&P 500, and shifting perception

5:00 Liquidity asset vs risk-off asset: reconciling the paradox

6:30 Dual drivers: global liquidity and crisis demand

8:00 Declining volatility and shallower bitcoin drawdowns

9:30 Why traditional markets avoid prolonged recessions

12:00 Debt dynamics and the inevitability of policy response

14:00 Faster Fed response cycles from 2008 to today

16:00 The “big print” and bitcoin as the primary beneficiary

17:30 Role of technology and information flow in policy decisions

20:00 Monetary policy, asset inflation, and wealth concentration

21:30 Fastest stock market rally since 1982 and implications

23:30 V-shaped recoveries and forward market returns

25:00 Institutional positioning and bullish equity signals

27:00 Treasury market stress and liquidity risks

28:30 Why markets rise in both good and bad scenarios

30:00 Bitcoin’s origin and alignment with monetary debasement

31:30 Coffeezilla debate and digital credit misconceptions

35:00 STRC mechanics and sustainability of yield

40:00 Bitcoin balance sheet coverage and risk framing

43:30 Bitcoin decoupling from tech and software stocks

46:00 Long-term path toward an uncorrelated asset

46:30 What to own if bitcoin did not exist

48:30 Closing thoughts and where to follow

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Fortress – BF216 - Top Bitcoin News - 5/17/26
item.description:
Date: May 17, 2026
Block Height: 949842
Moscow Time: 1280
Fees: 1 / 1 / 2

 

In this episode:

In Episode 216 of The Bitcoin Fortress Podcast, we explore why the real signal this week wasn’t Bitcoin’s price action — it was growing stress inside the legacy financial system itself. We discuss Japan’s bond market turmoil, the advancing CLARITY Act and the fight over developer freedom, why self-custody is increasingly becoming a civil liberties issue, MARA’s massive Bitcoin sale and pivot into AI infrastructure, renewed discussions around privacy in Bitcoin, and what these trends reveal about the future of money, sovereignty, and financial freedom. Plus: Bitcoin podcast universe themes, a featured Bitcoin Fortress Substack post, and a look at the newly released book The Architecture of Money.

 

Bitcoin Fortress YouTube Channel:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCEPGN1YCIQcMxkUig5GaNrQ

 

Bitcoin Fortress Substack Featured Post:

  • The Bitcoin Lifestyle

  • The Architecture of Money

item.title: Unchained – Bits + Bips: The Interview — The $16 Trillion Repo Market Is TradFi’s Central Nervous System. Its Finally Coming Onchain
item.description:
The repo market is $16 trillion globally and most people have never heard of it — until the plumbing breaks. Craig Burchell of FalconX and Matteo Pandolfi of Pareto explain how it works and why bringing it on-chain is the next big unlock for DeFi.

---

Heads up!

If you haven’t yet, be sure to subscribe to Bits + Bips, since the show will migrate there in a few weeks. Follow us on ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Apple Podcasts⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠YouTube⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Spotify⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠X⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Unchained⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ and wherever you get your podcasts.

----

The repo market is $16 trillion globally and it is, as Craig Burchell puts it, the oil that makes everything go. It is also almost entirely absent from on-chain finance — and that gap is creating real problems for RWA liquidity, stablecoin swap desks, and DeFi protocols trying to manage redemption queues. Steve Ehrlich sits down with Craig Burchell, head of lending at FalconX, and Matteo Pandolfi, CEO of on-chain credit infrastructure provider Pareto, to map exactly how repo works, what broke in 2019, why it translates extremely well into onchain finance. Matteo puts a $1 trillion figure on where on-chain repo gets in five years. Craig gives you one reason it gets there and one very honest reason it might not.


Host:

  • ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Steve Ehrlich, Head of Research at SharpLink and Host of Bits + Bips: The Interview - https://x.com/Steven_Ehrlich

Guest:

  • ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Craig Burchell — Head of Lending, FalconX; previously Head of Lending at Membrane Finance. @_CraigBirchall

  • ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Matteo Pandolfi — CEO & Co-Founder, Pareto (on-chain credit infrastructure). @pan_teo_

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

]]>

item.title: House of Satoshi - Bitcoin und Friends – #57 Community Q&A – Fragen zu Michael Saylor, Energieknappheit und Stablecoins
item.description:
**Diese Episode wird von PostFinance präsentiert***

PostFinance lanciert als erste Schweizer Retailbank ein E-Vermögensverwaltungsmandat, das global ausgerichtete Anlagen, Megatrends und Kryptowährungen kombiniert.

Infos zum ⁠E-Vermögensverwaltungsmandat «Zukunft» finden sich hier.⁠

********************************************************

Teil 2 unserer Community-Episode. Diesmal: Ist Energieknappheit ein Risiko für Bitcoin? Kann ein Hedgefonds Michael Saylor unter Druck setzen? Warum hat meine Pensionskasse kein Bitcoin? Und was bringt eigentlich ein CHF-Stablecoin?

Kernaussagen:

  • Das Difficulty Adjustment schützt Bitcoin automatisch vor Energiekrisen
  • Strategy hat nie auf Kredit gekauft – kein Kredit, kein Margin-Call-Risiko
  • Schweizer Pensionskassen fehlt Bitcoin noch komplett – in den USA läuft es bereits an
  • Stablecoins sind programmierbares Geld: instant, günstig, ohne Intermediäre

Links:

Pizza Bitcoin Day, 20. Mai – Infos & Tickets

https://www.house-of-satoshi.ch/veranstaltungen/bitcoin-pizza-day-der-live-podcast-2026/


Descartes Finance : Säule 3a mit Bitcoin-Strategie

https://descartes.swiss/de-ch/saeule-3a/


]]>

item.title: State of Bitcoin with Brandon Keys – The European Bitcoin Ban Hiding In Plain Sight with Matyas Kuchar - State of Bitcoin Ep. 238
item.description:
Until last year, more than 1,000 restaurants in Czech Republic accepted Bitcoin. Then it all stopped.

The MiCA regulation didn't ban Bitcoin in Europe. It did something far more effective — it made the rails impossible to operate. And as the Czech merchant economy quietly disappeared, two bigger forces started moving in the background: the petrodollar dying, and CBDCs coming online in Europe THIS YEAR.

In this episode, I sit down with Matyas Kuchar — co-founder of BTC Prague, the largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe, and one of the most thoughtful voices on European Bitcoin policy — to break down why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe, why the European surveillance state is spreading faster than Americans realize, and why he believes Bitcoin must win because the alternative is just so much worse.

You'll learn:

→ How MiCA quietly killed 1,000+ Bitcoin-accepting restaurants in Czech Republic — and why it wasn't even a direct ban

→ Why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe (Trezor, Slush Pool, BIP-39, General Bytes — all started in Prague)

→ Why the petrodollar is dying — and what the loss of US hegemony means for global decentralization

→ Why Europeans use Bitcoin as money while Americans treat it as digital gold — and which approach is right

item.itunes:summary:
Until last year, more than 1,000 restaurants in Czech Republic accepted Bitcoin. Then it all stopped.

The MiCA regulation didn't ban Bitcoin in Europe. It did something far more effective — it made the rails impossible to operate. And as the Czech merchant economy quietly disappeared, two bigger forces started moving in the background: the petrodollar dying, and CBDCs coming online in Europe THIS YEAR.

In this episode, I sit down with Matyas Kuchar — co-founder of BTC Prague, the largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe, and one of the most thoughtful voices on European Bitcoin policy — to break down why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe, why the European surveillance state is spreading faster than Americans realize, and why he believes Bitcoin must win because the alternative is just so much worse.

You'll learn:

→ How MiCA quietly killed 1,000+ Bitcoin-accepting restaurants in Czech Republic — and why it wasn't even a direct ban

→ Why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe (Trezor, Slush Pool, BIP-39, General Bytes — all started in Prague)

→ Why the petrodollar is dying — and what the loss of US hegemony means for global decentralization

→ Why Europeans use Bitcoin as money while Americans treat it as digital gold — and which approach is right

→ The European CBDC threat: pilots are launching THIS YEAR — and why most Americans haven't heard about it

→ The CBDC mechanism in Matyas's words: "You can analyze, you can control, you can surveil, you can send from a helicopter"

item.title: The Peter McCormack Show – #175 - Dr Melvin Vopson - A Physicist Says Reality May Be Code
item.description:
Physicist Professor Melvin Vopson joins Peter McCormack to discuss information physics, simulation theory, AI, digital life, consciousness, God, free will, and death.


Melvin argues that the universe may be governed by information and computation, and that recent advances in brain emulation could force us to confront one of the strangest questions imaginable: if a brain is loaded into a simulation, what exactly wakes up?


- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -


TIMESTAMPS:

00:00:00 — If You Hack the Simulation, You Control the Universe!

00:01:25 — Why Does Life Feel Artificial?

00:03:26 — Are We Living in a Simulation?

00:05:45 — What Is Information Physics?

00:10:09 — Information as the Fifth State of Matter

00:11:18 — John Wheeler and “It from Bit”

00:13:33 — Is DNA Just Information?

00:16:08 — Who Created the Creator?

00:19:47 — How Would Mario Prove He’s Inside the Game?

00:25:46 — Does the Universe Optimise Itself?

00:29:35 — Is Symmetry a Form of Compression?

00:30:40 — GTA, Rendering, and Computational Reality

00:32:37 — Error-Correcting Code in Physics

00:37:30 — Could Information Explain Dark Matter?

00:40:24 — If You Hack Reality, You Control the Universe

00:45:36 — “In the Beginning Was the Word”

00:46:29 — “In the Beginning Was the Code”

00:57:20 — What Exactly Wakes Up in There?

01:00:32 — But Is It Me?

01:20:56 — Would Proof of Simulation Change Anything?


- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -


CONTACT PETE

› Website – http://petermccormack.com

› Feedback – https://www.petermccormack.com/contact

› Email – me@petermccormack.com

› Instagram – /mccormack555

› X/Twitter – https://x.com/petermccormack/


CONNECT WITH MELVIN VOPSON

› Website:

– https://sites.google.com/site/melvinvopson/

– https://www.port.ac.uk/about-us/structure-and-governance/our-people/our-staff/melvin-vopson

item.title: Bitcoiners - Live From Bitcoin Beach – Behind The World's First Bitcoin Air Taxi Network in El Salvador
item.description:
Explore how James McBride (@cnasalvador) is building El Salvador’s sovereign aviation infrastructure. From ferrying a helicopter 3,000 miles to launching the first Bitcoin-friendly air taxi, learn how Cielo Norte Aviacion is decentralizing the skies and skipping fiat traffic jams.

National sovereignty depends on more than just a digital currency because citizens remain limited by crumbling fiat infrastructure and exhausting traffic jams. In this episode, James McBride argues that freedom requires the physical infrastructure to move as fast as Bitcoin. By launching Cielo Norte Aviacion, James is betting that the future of the Salvadoran Citadel depends on decentralizing the skies to allow for a level of mobility that was previously impossible in Central America.

The journey to establish this vision involved a literal trial by fire that started with a grueling international flight from Northern Ontario. James recounts the logistics of ferrying a helicopter 3,000 miles across borders while navigating the shifting regulations of multiple countries and searching for jet fuel in remote regions. This story of grit and proof of work highlights the massive physical effort required to build a new business in the Bitcoin nation and describes the immense relief he felt when the aircraft finally touched down on Salvadoran soil.

As James reaches the finish line of his AAC certification, he is preparing to launch a high speed air taxi service that changes the last mile logistics of El Salvador. His fleet offers private charters that reach world class surf breaks like Punta Mango in under thirty minutes so that travelers can bypass the nightmare traffic of San Salvador. This initiative creates a functional network that connects the most remote and beautiful locations in the country to the economic heart of the city.

The business expansion includes a clear roadmap for industrial and government support alongside tourism. By utilizing aerial surveying and Lidar technology, Cielo Norte facilitates mining operations and infrastructure planning with a level of precision and speed that drones cannot match. This technical edge and the future addition of fixed-wing aircraft for cargo position the company to become the backbone of Salvadoran industry and a critical pillar of the economic rebirth of the country.

James also shares a behind the scenes look at his private meeting with President Bukele where he pitched the vision of making El Salvador the aviation hub of Latin America. This comprehensive family approach spanning from Bitcoin exchanges to the skies reflects a unique moment in history where entrepreneurs are actively building the world they want to live in. Whether you are a pilot interested in technical flight rules or a Bitcoiner looking for the next frontier of growth, this episode demonstrates that the sky is no longer the limit in El Salvador.

—Bitcoin Beach Team



Connect and Learn more about James McBride
X (Company): https://x.com/cnasalvador
Web: https://www.cielonorteaviacion.com/
IG: https://www.instagram.com/cielonorteaviacion/
WhatsApp (Business Line): +503 7745 8200

Support and follow Bitcoin Beach:
X: https://www.twitter.com/BitcoinBeach
IG: https://www.instagram.com/bitcoinbeach_sv 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livefrombitcoinbeach 
Web: https://www.bitcoinbeach.com 

Browse through this quick guide to learn more about the episode:
00:00 Intro
01:13 Why the McBride family moved their business to El Salvador
02:48 Scaling a Canadian mining airline into a Salvadoran charter
04:12 Flying a helicopter 3,000 miles from Canada to El Salvador
06:15 How air taxis solve the San Salvador traffic nightmare
11:51 Navigating 10,000-foot mountain ranges under VFR rules
13:38 Why El Salvador’s geography is perfect for helicopters
16:02 Using Lidar aerial surveying for mining and

Live From Bitcoin Beach

item.title: Surfin' Bitcoin – Il met du BITCOIN dans la trésorerie de sa PME de 100 salariés (retour terrain)
item.description:
Comment un dirigeant de PME en place une partie de la trésorerie de son entreprise en Bitcoin ? Pourquoi ? Combien ? Avec quelles précautions ?


Dans cet épisode, Jonathan Herscovici reçoit Wojtek Jamka, cofondateur de Web-Atrio (https://www.web-atrio.com), une ESN française de 100 salariés et 9 M€ de chiffre d'affaires, cliente de StackinSat en DCA automatique.


Wojtek partage sans filtre son retour d'expérience de dirigeant qui a fait le choix d'allouer une partie de la trésorerie excédentaire de sa société en Bitcoin.


Au programme de cet épisode :

➤ Pourquoi les comptes à terme bancaires sont structurellement perdants face à l'inflation

➤ Comment son histoire personnelle (né dans la Pologne soviétique) a forgé sa compréhension de la dévaluation monétaire

➤ La méthodologie concrète de Web-Atrio : DCA mensuel + acceptation des paiements clients en Bitcoin

➤ La règle des 5 à 10 % de trésorerie blocable à ne pas dépasser

➤ Self custody, multisignature, protocoles anti-enlèvement : sécuriser les Bitcoin d'une entreprise

➤ Bitcoin direct, ETF, Bitcoin Treasury Companies : quel véhicule choisir selon son profil

➤ Comment convaincre un dirigeant qui hésite


Un épisode complémentaire de notre interview avec Alexandre Laizet (Capital B) sur les Bitcoin Treasury Companies, cette fois côté PME non cotée.


📊 Vous êtes dirigeant et souhaitez placer une partie de votre trésorerie en Bitcoin ?

StackinSat accompagne les entreprises dans la gestion de leur trésorerie BTC.

👉 https://stackinsat.com/signup/1?r=SURFIN


00:00 – Introduction : Wojtek Jamka, dirigeant de Web-Atrio (ESN, 100 salariés)

03:12 – Pourquoi Bitcoin pour une PME ? Comptes à terme, inflation et trésorerie qui se déprécie

10:58 – De la Pologne soviétique à Bitcoin : ce qu'on apprend quand sa monnaie ne vaut plus rien

15:38 – Conviction personnelle ou décision rationnelle ? La double lecture du dirigeant

17:40 – DCA, paiements clients en BTC : combien Web-Atrio alloue réellement, et la limite des 5 à 10 %

23:27 – Volatilité et sommeil du dirigeant : pourquoi le DCA bat le trading

28:05 – Self custody, multisig, protection contre l'enlèvement : sécuriser les BTC d'une entreprise

30:56 – Quel profil de PME peut franchir le pas ? Frenchtech, industrie, artisans

35:18 – Bitcoin direct, ETF, Bitcoin Treasury Companies : quel véhicule choisir ?

38:19 – Décision financière ou philosophique ? Et comment convaincre un dirigeant qui hésite

43:48 – Conclusion


🎓 Pour comprendre Bitcoin avant d'investir, suivez notre formation "Investir en Bitcoin" :

👉 https://www.investir-en-bitcoin.com/


📉 Mesurez la perte de pouvoir d'achat de votre trésorerie avec notre simulateur d'inflation :

👉 https://stackinsat.com/simulateur-inflation



🔔 Abonnez-vous à Surfin' Bitcoin pour ne manquer aucun épisode

👍 Likez la vidéo si elle vous a plu

💬 Posez vos questions en commentaires



⚠️ Cette vidéo ne constitue pas un conseil en investissement. Bitcoin est un actif volatil. N'investissez que ce que vous êtes prêt à perdre. Faites vos propres recherches.

Hébergé par Acast. Visitez acast.com/privacy pour plus d'informations.

]]>
item.itunes:summary:
Comment un dirigeant de PME en place une partie de la trésorerie de son entreprise en Bitcoin ? Pourquoi ? Combien ? Avec quelles précautions ?


Dans cet épisode, Jonathan Herscovici reçoit Wojtek Jamka, cofondateur de Web-Atrio (https://www.web-atrio.com), une ESN française de 100 salariés et 9 M€ de chiffre d'affaires, cliente de StackinSat en DCA automatique.


Wojtek partage sans filtre son retour d'expérience de dirigeant qui a fait le choix d'allouer une partie de la trésorerie excédentaire de sa société en Bitcoin.


Au programme de cet épisode :

➤ Pourquoi les comptes à terme bancaires sont structurellement perdants face à l'inflation

➤ Comment son histoire personnelle (né dans la Pologne soviétique) a forgé sa compréhension de la dévaluation monétaire

➤ La méthodologie concrète de Web-Atrio : DCA mensuel + acceptation des paiements clients en Bitcoin

➤ La règle des 5 à 10 % de trésorerie blocable à ne pas dépasser

➤ Self custody, multisignature, protocoles anti-enlèvement : sécuriser les Bitcoin d'une entreprise

➤ Bitcoin direct, ETF, Bitcoin Treasury Companies : quel véhicule choisir selon son profil

➤ Comment convaincre un dirigeant qui hésite


Un épisode complémentaire de notre interview avec Alexandre Laizet (Capital B) sur les Bitcoin Treasury Companies, cette fois côté PME non cotée.


📊 Vous êtes dirigeant et souhaitez placer une partie de votre trésorerie en Bitcoin ?

StackinSat accompagne les entreprises dans la gestion de leur trésorerie BTC.

👉 https://stackinsat.com/signup/1?r=SURFIN


00:00 – Introduction : Wojtek Jamka, dirigeant de Web-Atrio (ESN, 100 salariés)

03:12 – Pourquoi Bitcoin pour une PME ? Comptes à terme, inflation et trésorerie qui se déprécie

10:58 – De la Pologne soviétique à Bitcoin : ce qu'on apprend quand sa monnaie ne vaut plus rien

15:38 – Conviction personnelle ou décision rationnelle ? La double lecture du dirigeant

17:40 – DCA, paiements clients en BTC : combien Web-Atrio alloue réellement, et la limite des 5 à 10 %

23:27 – Volatilité et sommeil du dirigeant : pourquoi le DCA bat le trading

28:05 – Self custody, multisig, protection contre l'enlèvement : sécuriser les BTC d'une entreprise

30:56 – Quel profil de PME peut franchir le pas ? Frenchtech, industrie, artisans

35:18 – Bitcoin direct, ETF, Bitcoin Treasury Companies : quel véhicule choisir ?

38:19 – Décision financière ou philosophique ? Et comment convaincre un dirigeant qui hésite

43:48 – Conclusion


🎓 Pour comprendre Bitcoin avant d'investir, suivez notre formation "Investir en Bitcoin" :

👉 https://www.investir-en-bitcoin.com/


📉 Mesurez la perte de pouvoir d'achat de votre trésorerie avec notre simulateur d'inflation :

👉 https://stackinsat.com/simulateur-inflation



🔔 Abonnez-vous à Surfin' Bitcoin pour ne manquer aucun épisode

👍 Likez la vidéo si elle vous a plu

💬 Posez vos questions en commentaires



⚠️ Cette vidéo ne constitue pas un conseil en investissement. Bitcoin est un actif volatil. N'investissez que ce que vous êtes prêt à perdre. Faites vos propres recherches.

Hébergé par Acast. Visitez acast.com/privacy pour plus d'informations.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll – From Libra to Legitimacy: Circle's Stablecoin R(e)volution
item.description:
In this episode of BFRR, Jonas and guest host Jonathan Koll welcome back one of the most influential voices in digital money: Dante Disparte, Head of Strategy and Global Policy at Circle. Four years after his last appearance on the show, Dante returns for a wide-ranging conversation on how stablecoins moved from regulatory controversy to the core of the global financial system.

The discussion begins with Dante’s personal path into crypto: from cyber risk and financial resilience to the early blockchain debates, the Libra project, and the hard lessons learned when big ideas collide with politics, regulation and public trust. Looking back, Dante argues that Libra may have been controversial, but it also accelerated the global conversation around digital money and helped pave the way for today’s regulatory clarity.

From there, the conversation turns to Circle’s evolution. Once mainly known as the issuer of USDC, Circle is now positioning itself as a full-stack financial infrastructure company. Dante explains the role of USDC as a regulated digital dollar, EURC as the leading euro-denominated stablecoin, USYC as a tokenized money market fund, and Circle’s broader technology stack, including the Circle Payments Network and the upcoming ARK blockchain.

The episode also explores the changing stablecoin use cases: from crypto trading and decentralized finance to cross-border payments, capital markets collateral, store-of-value demand in unstable economies and even agentic commerce, where AI systems may increasingly transact with each other using programmable money.

Regulation is another major theme. Dante compares Europe’s MiCA framework with the U.S. GENIUS Act, discusses the search for international harmonization, and reflects on the United Kingdom’s opportunity to define its own digital asset regime. The conversation also touches on digital identity, financial inclusion, and why open standards may be essential to bring billions of people into the formal economy.

A sharp, thoughtful and occasionally funny episode about stablecoins, regulation, institutional adoption and the future of money — with one of the few people who has been at the center of the debate from Libra to Circle.

Dante Disparte LinkedIn

Dante Disparte X

Circle Website

Article Korea Herald

Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll Website

Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll Telegram Channel

Point Zero Forum: Join us in Zurich on 23–25 June 2026 at the Point Zero Forum, the annual gathering of 2,000+ policymakers, central bankers, regulators, and industry leaders at the intersection of finance, technology, and policy: Click here. Use the code "BFRR2026" to get 30% off the full-price Industry Pass. BFRR is proud media partner of the event. Relai: Buy Bitcoin with Relai—you can do a one-time purchase or savings plan: Click here. Use the referral code "ROCK" to reduce transaction fees by 0.1% while supporting Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll.

Value4Value Podcast Streaming: Support our podcast by listening to our episodes on the Fountain Podcast App. This way, if you wish, you can support us "Value4Value" while listening to the podcast. You can find us on the Fountain Podcast App here: Click here

Disclaimer: The content of this podcast reflects the private opinions of the hosts, serves exclusively for general information purposes and does not constitute investment advice. Always remember: Do your own research—inform yourself before making any investment decisions, such as buying Bitcoin. First try to understand what Bitcoin is and how to store it. This podcast does not provide financial advice. Note that the co-hosts might be invested in crypto assets. Read more on our website: Click here

All links marked with "*" are affiliate links. If you use these links for purchase, the podcast receives a small share of the revenue without any additional costs to you. On the contrary, affiliate links often include discount promotions, so you can even save money. We would appreciate it if you use these links to support us. Thank you very much!

item.title: Coin Stories with Natalie Brunell – News Block: Bond Markets Crash, Pro-Bitcoin Fed Chair Takes Over, Strategy Wipes Out $1.5B in Debt, and Strive Pays Daily Dividends
item.description:
In this week's episode of the Coin Stories News Block powered exclusively by Ledn, we cover these major headlines related to Bitcoin, macroeconomics, and global finance:

  • Strategy wipes $1.5 billion in debt off its books, moves to pay semi-monthly dividends for STRC
  • Strive becomes the first stock in U.S. history to pay daily dividends
  • New Fed Chair calls Bitcoin "the new gold" for anyone under 40
  • Senator Lummis makes the most powerful case for Bitcoin ever heard in the Senate

----

The News Block is powered exclusively by Ledn – the global leader in Bitcoin-backed loans, issuing over $10 billion in loans since 2018, and they were the first to offer proof of reserves. With Ledn, you get custody loans, no credit checks, no monthly payments, and more. My followers get .25% off their first loan. Learn more at www.ledn.io/natalie

----

  • Bond Traders See Tipping Point Toward a New Era of Higher Yields

  • G-7 to Discuss Bond Selloff Sending Yields to Multi-Decade Highs
  • Mounting Inflation Pressures Deepen Global Bond Slide

item.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute – Bitcoin Policy Hour: Crypto-Redollarization: Gold, Tether & Bitcoin Shaping the New Monetary Order
item.description:
Why did Tether launch a U.S. stablecoin now? Why does Coinbase have so much influence in Congress? And what’s really behind the SEC–CFTC harmonization push? Bitcoin Policy Hour breaks down the biggest regulatory stories shaping Bitcoin’s future plus a deep look at the debasement trade driving gold, silver, and potentially bitcoin higher.🔶 Connect with Zack Shapiro on X: https://x.com/zackbshapiro🔶 Connect with Zack Cohen on X: https://x.com/zackcohen_🔶 Connect with Ken Egan on X: https://x.com/Bayman11771🔶 Learn more about the Bitcoin Policy Institute: https://www.btcpolicy.org/Chapters: 03:15 – Tether’s GENIUS-Compliant U.S. Stablecoin Explained 07:30 – Is Tether’s U.S. Launch a Political Hedge? 11:45 – Stablecoins, Circle, and Global Liquidity 15:30 – SEC–CFTC Harmonization and Regulatory Power 20:10 – Market Structure, BRCA, and Developer Protections 26:00 – Section 1960 and the National Security Debate 33:20 – Why Coinbase Has So Much Influence in Congress 41:00 – Stablecoin Yield, Banks, and Political Fatigue 47:00 – Gold, Silver, Debasement, and Bitcoin’s Moment

item.title: Sound Money Bitcoin Podcast – #324 Bitcoin-Mangos & Abwärme: Das innovativste Mining-Modell der Welt
item.description:
Sascha Grumbach ist Gründer und CEO von Green Mining, einem Schweizer Unternehmen, das Bitcoin-Mining neu denkt. Bevor er selbst eine Mining-Firma aufgebaut hat, ist er auf Mining-Scams hereingefallen – eine Erfahrung, die ihn geprägt hat und die Grundlage für sein heutiges Geschäftsmodell ist. Green Mining betreibt Mining-Farmen an verschiedenen Standorten weltweit und bindet Investoren als echte Anteilseigner der Schweizer Gesellschaft ein.

item.itunes:summary:
Sascha Grumbach ist Gründer und CEO von Green Mining, einem Schweizer Unternehmen, das Bitcoin-Mining neu denkt. Bevor er selbst eine Mining-Firma aufgebaut hat, ist er auf Mining-Scams hereingefallen – eine Erfahrung, die ihn geprägt hat und die Grundlage für sein heutiges Geschäftsmodell ist. Green Mining betreibt Mining-Farmen an verschiedenen Standorten weltweit und bindet Investoren als echte Anteilseigner der Schweizer Gesellschaft ein.

item.title: Store of Bitcoin - Bitcoin as Store of Value – Ep. 49 - Daniel Batten | A new different wave of Bitcoin Adopters.
item.description:
In this episode of Store of Bitcoin, host Alessandro Ottaviani welcomes Daniel Batten, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and investor, to discuss the evolving narrative surrounding Bitcoin, particularly in relation to energy consumption and environmental impact. Daniel shares insights on how the mainstream media's perception of Bitcoin has shifted from skepticism to a more favorable view, largely due to rigorous research and advocacy from the Bitcoin community. He emphasizes the importance of effectively communicating Bitcoin's benefits to various stakeholders, including policymakers and investors, to foster broader adoption.

The conversation delves into the challenges of reaching new adopters, particularly those who may not be motivated by the same values that initially attracted early Bitcoin enthusiasts. Daniel highlights the need for a more nuanced approach to education and outreach, focusing on the social and environmental benefits of Bitcoin. He also discusses the potential for Bitcoin to serve as a tool for financial inclusion in developing countries, where it can provide a safeguard against inflation and empower individuals in oppressive regimes. The episode concludes with a look at future trends in Bitcoin adoption and the importance of aligning messaging with the values of diverse audiences.

This episode is sponsored by ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠BitVault⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, the new open-source & self-custody wallet utilizing time-delays and multisignature to offset physical attacks and hacks.

item.title: The Bitcoin Way Podcast – Hantavirus Hype is Bullish For Bitcoin | Bitcoin Banter
item.description:

https://www.thebitcoinway.com/services/bitcoin-self-custody-training?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=youtube

-------------------------

In this episode of Bitcoin Banter, Michael, Tony and guest Sophi discuss the media’s latest pandemic scaremongering over Hantavirus - and why it might be just another convenient excuse to fire up the money printers.

They also cover Trump’s $1.2 trillion Golden Dome missile defense plan, Modi pleading with Indians to stop buying gold as the rupee hits record lows, UK kids using fake mustaches to dodge age verification, teens hacking digital ID databases and our Donkey of the Week - Leonidas NFT, who demanded the BIP-110 be withdrawn - announced that ord.io is shutting down after running out of money.

-------------------------

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS:

00:00 - Recap

00:27 - Hantavirus Pandemic 2.0 and the Return of the Money Printer

06:16 - Trump’s $1.2 Trillion Golden Dome

12:54 - Modi Tells Indians to Stop Buying Gold

17:58 - UK Kids Fool Age Verification With Fake Mustaches

22:02 - Kids Hacking Government ID Systems

27:21 - Donkey of The Week - Leonidas NFT Shuts Down Ord.io and ZapApp

-------------------------

item.title: einemillionsatoshi - der Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin und Beziehung: Warum Überzeugen selten funktioniert
item.description:
Deine Begeisterung für Bitcoin ist riesig, aber zu Hause stößt du auf Granit? In dieser Folge von "einemillionsatoshi" erfährst du, wie du das Thema Bitcoin in deine Beziehung bringst, ohne einen Familienstreit auszulösen. Ich bespreche, warum technisches Fachchinesisch oft der falsche Weg ist und wie du stattdessen über gesellschaftliche Werte und echte Lösungen für Alltagsprobleme wie die Inflation sprichst.

item.title: Münzcrime - True Crime Bitcoin Podcast – Mt. Gox: "Withdrawal denied". Episode 5
item.description:
Doch der Weg ins Chaos war kein einziger Sprung. Es begann mit einer Serie von Sicherheitspannen und technischem Versagen – Warnsignale, die ignoriert wurden. Diese Inkompetenz schuf ein Vakuum, ein digitales Schlupfloch, durch das schließlich nicht nur Fehler, sondern echte Angreifer strömten. Erst die chronischen Pannen, dann der massive Hack, der das System endgültig zum Einsturz brachte.

Willkommen zur fünften Ausgabe unseres Podcasts. Wir sind tief in den Fall Mt. Gox eingetaucht, um diesen komplexen Skandal chronologisch zu entwirren. Von den bescheidenen Anfängen in der Frühzeit von Bitcoin bis hin zu den heutigen, kaum zu fassenden Auswüchsen dieses historischen Desasters. Wir zeigen euch, wie aus einer kleinen Nischenplattform einer der größten Bitcoin-Skandale aller Zeiten wurde – und warum die Folgen bis heute nachhallen.

V4V:
crime21@getalby.com

Nostr:
npub14cz50cvahflq8kpe57qxnnvgmveyng6l8fdtessdqm8ht9fcly3qjd20ry

X:
https://x.com/Muenzcrime

E-Mail:
muenzcrime@tuta.io

Links zur Folge:

https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2015/02/19/report-mt-gox-data-provides-more-clues-to-trading-bot-willy

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hvCdu0zsSP4 
https://x.com/brucefenton/status/2049593550506242127 
https://darknetdiaries.com/transcript/9/

https://www.vccircle.com/former-ceo-of-failed-bitcoin-exchange-mt-gox-pleads-not-guilty-to-embezzlement

item.title: Bitcoin Archive w Archie – AI & FED Printing will spark BIGGEST Bitcoin Bull Run Ever | Joe Consorti
item.description:
Is Bitcoin entering a completely different era?

In this conversation with Joe Consorti, we break down Bitcoin’s latest market structure, why this cycle looks fundamentally different from previous ones, and how macro forces like AI, war, inflation, and monetary policy could shape the next major move for Bitcoin.

From ETF inflows to software stock correlations, and the collapse of the traditional 4-year cycle narrative. Bitcoin may be transitioning into an explosive, and far more mature future.

⚠️ Bitcoin’s next bull market may not look like a short-term mania, but a sustained multi-year expansion.


CONNECT WITH JOE CONSORTI

item.title: Bitcoin Magazine Podcast – The Banks Lose The Yield Fight: Inside The CLARITY Act Stablecoin Battle | BPH EP 37
item.description:
Why are bankers, the AFL-CIO, and law enforcement unions all storming Capitol Hill at the same time? In this episode of the Bitcoin Policy Hour, Zack Cohen sits down with Zack Shapiro and Ken Egan to dissect the CLARITY Act markup, the BRCA developer protection carve-out, and the bizarre coalition trying to kill stablecoin yield. They explain why Tim Scott and the Senate Banking Republicans held the line and what 100+ amendments from Senator Cortez Masto really mean.

🔶 Connect with Zack Shapiro on X: https://x.com/zackbshapiro

🔶 Connect with Zack Cohen on X: https://x.com/zackcohen_

🔶 Connect with Ken Egan on X: https://x.com/Bayman11771

🔶 Learn more about the Bitcoin Policy Institute: https://www.btcpolicy.org/

Chapters:

03:00 — BRCA Developer Carve-Out Explained: Intent vs. Knowledge Under Section 1960

08:30 — Why Tornado Cash and Samourai Wallet Prosecutors Couldn't Prove Specific Intent

14:00 — Civil Liberties vs. Law Enforcement: Where BPI Draws the Line

19:00 — Bankers, AFL-CIO, and Police Unions: The Strange Coalition Against CLARITY

24:00 — 100+ Amendments, Cortez Masto, and the Real Risk of Legal Gray Areas

29:30 — Section 404 and Stablecoin Yield: How Coinbase and Circle Won the Loophole

37:30 — The Two-Year FDIC Study: Why Congress Loves a "Nothing Burger"

39:30 — Ken Egan on Iran: Federalization, the IRGC, and Regime-Change Risk

49:30 — Trump's Xi Meeting, Tech Leaders, and the U.S.–China AGI Race

#Bitcoin #BitcoinPolicy #CLARITYAct #BRCA #StablecoinYield #GENIUSAct #TornadoCash #SamouraiWallet #Section1960 #BankSecrecyAct #FinCEN #Coinbase #Circle #USDC #SenateBanking #TimScott #ElizabethWarren #CortezMasto #BitcoinPolicyInstitute #BPI #Washington #Regulation #DigitalAssets #Stablecoins #NonCustodial #PrivacyTools #DeveloperRights #Iran #TrumpXi #China #IRGC #RegimeChange #USPolicy #Geopolitics #BitcoinNews

DISCLAIMER: The views and opinions expressed in this show are those of the participants and do not necessarily reflect the official policy or position of BTC Inc., Bitcoin Magazine, or any affiliated entities. This content is provided for informational and educational purposes only and should not be construed as investment, legal, tax, or accounting advice. Nothing contained in this show constitutes a solicitation, recommendation, endorsement, or offer to buy or sell any securities or financial instruments. Viewers should consult their own advisors before making financial or business decisions.

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Infinity Show – Defending Bitcoin: Cybersecurity for the Monetary Grid | Luke de Wolf | BIS #202
item.description:
Luke de Wolf joins the Bitcoin Infinity Show to talk about his upcoming book Defending Bitcoin: Industrial-Grade Cybersecurity for the Monetary Grid, the cybersecurity case for treating Bitcoin as critical infrastructure, and why arbitrary data on Bitcoin should be considered a textbook availability vulnerability. The conversation covers Luke's reversal on BIP-110, the governance concentration around Bitcoin Core, and why decentralized mining through Ocean, Datum, and Stratum V2 is essential for keeping the network resilient. Knut and Luke also preview BTC Prague, the Dublin conference, and the upcoming BTCHEL event in Helsinki this September, with its tracks on Nordic sovereignty, mining and energy, and Bitcoin for human rights.

Connect with Luke:

https://x.com/lukedewolf

https://primal.net/luke

https://defendingbitcoin.com/

https://btchel.com/

Connect with Us:

https://bitcoininfinitystore.com

https://primal.net/infinity

https://primal.net/knut

https://primal.net/luke

https://twitter.com/BtcInfinityShow

https://twitter.com/knutsvanholm

https://twitter.com/lukedewolf

item.title: Rob Wallace | Bitcoin News – The Oil Crisis Is Hiding a $4.5T Debt Bomb No One Can Pay | Infra
item.description:
The Biggest Bubble Ever? | Infra Explains Why Markets Are Breaking Upwards, Debt Is Exploding & Bitcoin Could Hit $10M

In this macro deep dive, Rob Wallace sits down with market analyst Robert (@infraa_) to unpack what may be the most dangerous financial environment in modern history.

Despite war in the Middle East, soaring oil prices, record sovereign debt, and mounting stress in global credit markets, stocks continue ripping higher. Why?

Infra argues that governments and central banks are desperately trying to keep the bubble alive through debt issuance, market intervention, liquidity injections, and financial engineering. But according to him, the system is reaching a breaking point.

]]>
item.itunes:summary:
The Biggest Bubble Ever? | Infra Explains Why Markets Are Breaking Upwards, Debt Is Exploding & Bitcoin Could Hit $10M

In this macro deep dive, Rob Wallace sits down with market analyst Robert (@infraa_) to unpack what may be the most dangerous financial environment in modern history.

Despite war in the Middle East, soaring oil prices, record sovereign debt, and mounting stress in global credit markets, stocks continue ripping higher. Why?

Infra argues that governments and central banks are desperately trying to keep the bubble alive through debt issuance, market intervention, liquidity injections, and financial engineering. But according to him, the system is reaching a breaking point.

]]>

item.title: Crypto Nerds Podcast - Krypto, Bitcoin, Web3 & Co. – Uncut | FED-Wechsel, Clarity Act und Claude knackt Bitcoin-Wallet?
item.description:
Diese Episode wird wie immer unterstützt von unserem Partner und Krypto-Broker Bison https://bit.ly/cryptonerds-bison

10 Euro BISON Gutschein (Code: BITCOIN10): https://bisonapp.com/gutschein/podcast

Jetzt Early Access sichern - Crypto Nerds Trading Lab Lerne Trading, teste Strategien mit Demogeld und nimm an Wettbewerben teil, komplett risikofrei. Jetzt kostenlos registrieren: https://tradinglab.cryptonerds.com/

Einordnung & Überblick

Eine der vollgepacktesten Wochen seit Monaten: Jerome Powell gibt den FED-Vorsitz ab, Kevin Warsh übernimmt. Der Clarity Act kommt voran. Bitcoin schwankt zwischen 78.000 und 82.000 Dollar. ETF-Inflows drehen ins Minus. Und eine Geschichte über KI und Bitcoin-Wallets macht die Runde. Eric und Sascha schauen sich alles an.

Themen dieser Woche

• Bitcoin-Kurs zwischen 78.000 und 82.000 Dollar: Geopolitik, CPI und Risk-off

• April-CPI in den USA bei 3,8 Prozent: Was das für den Markt bedeutet

• Bitcoin ETF-Outflows: Was in der Vorwoche reinkam, ist wieder raus

• Clarity Act passiert Senate Banking Committee mit 15 zu 9

• Stablecoin-Yields: In den USA bald erlaubt, unter MiCA in Europa weiter nicht

• Warum Banken zunächst blockiert haben und was der Kompromiss bedeutet

• Powell abtretend, Warsh bestätigt mit 54 zu 45, eine der knappsten Abstimmungen

• QT for Cuts: Warum Warsh Zinsen senken und gleichzeitig Liquidität abziehen will

• Warsh in Solana und Polychain investiert, gilt als kryptoaffin

• Nächste FOMC-Sitzung am 16./17. Juni, Zinssenkung laut Polymarket unwahrscheinlich

• Trump in China: H200-Chip-Export erlaubt, Boeing verkauft 200 Jets

• KI und Bitcoin-Wallet: Was wirklich passiert ist und was die Medien daraus gemacht haben

• Sicherheitstipps: Seed Phrases und Passwörter gehören offline

Moderation Eric Heinemann – @cryptonerds Sascha Röhrer – @CONF3RENCE

Community & Links

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cryptonerds_com/

X (Twitter): https://x.com/EricCryptoNerds

item.title: THE Bitcoin Podcast – QUANTIFYING THE VIBES: Bitcoin Sentiment Analysis, Memes, and Fiction | Michael Sullivan
item.description:
In this episode, I sit down with Michael Sullivan, author of Blood of the Bourgeoisie, to explore his groundbreaking Bitcoin sentiment analysis work that goes far beyond the fear and greed index, tracking individual high-signal Bitcoiners' language at a granularity most hedge funds only use behind closed doors. We also go deep on Blood of the Bourgeoisie, the Bitcoin thriller I had the honor of narrating, which captures the inner conflict every Bitcoiner knows between wanting to burn the system down and finding the more constructive path forward. The conversation dives into language, narrative formation, Bitcoin culture, the psychology of markets, AI-assisted creativity, and the tension many Bitcoiners feel between revolutionary anger and peaceful opt-out through freedom technology.

FOLLOW MICHAEL:

X: https://x.com/SullyMichaelvan

item.description:

item.title: BITCOIN & ALTCOINS – Die ersten Coins brechen nach oben aus
item.description:
An der Wall Street jagt aktuell ein All Time High das nächste. Währenddessen hat der Bitcoin noch einiges an Aufholpotenzial und tritt bei 80.000 bis 81.000 Dollar auf der Stelle. Weshalb das Sentiment jetzt dreht, wie weit eine Rally tragen kann, welche Rolle der Dollar spielt und weshalb Ondo und SUI erste Anzeichen des Drucks nach oben zeigen, erfahren Sie in einer neuen Folge von „BITCOIN & ALTCOINS“ mit Oliver Michel (tokentus investment AG).

Hinweis: Die im Podcast besprochenen Coins und Token stellen keine spezifischen Kauf- oder Anlageempfehlungen dar. Die Moderatoren oder der Verlag haften nicht für etwaige Verluste, die aufgrund der Umsetzung der im Podcast diskutierten Gedanken oder Ideen entstehen.

Tägliche Informationen gefällig? Dann ab zu „Krypto-Insights“ – dem Telegram-Kanal von Oliver Michel und Johanna Krämer. Weitere Infos unter www.krypto-insights.de

item.title: The Why Bitcoin Show – #100 - 100 Not Out: Reflections, Regrets and Why I'm Just Getting Started
item.description:
Episode 100. No intro. No ads. Just me.

This one is different. Just an honest reflection on 100 episodes, what this journey has actually been like, and where things are heading.

I share what drove me to start the show, the momentum I built and lost, the guests who genuinely changed how I think, and something personal I haven't said publicly before about confidence, doubt, and what it's taken to finally back myself.

I also explain why I built My Bitcoin Will, a DIY Bitcoin inheritance starter kit designed to help people get off zero and start closing the gap between law, access, and education.

If you're not ready to dive in yet, start with the free Bitcoin Inheritance Stress Test or download the checklist at My Bitcoin Will.

Also, some gentle shilling from my side. I've written a book. No Tenants, No Troubles: The Case for Digital Over Real Estate. Available on Amazon now: https://www.dalewarburton.com/book

Need a hand with self-custody? Book a session with me to get your Bitcoin security house in order.

And get on Nostr if you haven't already. It's a game changer. npub1r94hh3kt6re3j5jv7yg8rw0ah5fg90vw9pjklxzknvhdkx0famfsn0njzt

]]>

item.title: BTC-ECHO | Bitcoin & Krypto Podcasts – Marktupdate #55 | Inflation steigt – warum steigen Bitcoin & Altcoins trotzdem?
item.description:
Während die US-Indizes neue Allzeithochs anvisieren, sendet auch der Kryptomarkt wieder bullishe Signale. Gleichzeitig könnte der Clarity Act in den USA schon morgen zur wichtigsten politischen Richtungsentscheidung für den Altcoin-Sektor in diesem Jahr werden.

Im heutigen Livestream sprechen wir darüber:

warum Anleger trotz steigender Inflation weiter Risiko eingehen weshalb Bitcoin plötzlich wieder Stärke zeigt welche Altcoins aktuell Momentum aufbauen was der Clarity Act für den Kryptomarkt bedeuten könnte und ob Anleger gerade eine große Falle übersehen

Außerdem analysieren wir die wichtigsten Charts live und beantworten eure Fragen aus dem Chat.

📈 Bitcoin 📉 Inflation 🏛️ Regulierung 🔥 Altcoin-Momentum 📊 Live-Marktanalyse

item.description:

item.title: Bitcoin Optech Podcast – Bitcoin Optech: Newsletter #404 Recap
item.description:
Mark “Murch” Erhardt, Gustavo Flores Echaiz, and Mike Schmidt are joined by Daniela Brozzoni, Naiyoma, and Thomas Voegtlin to discuss Newsletter #404.


News

● Possible solutions to node fingerprinting (1:14)

● Public fraud proof for just-in-time channels (19:21)

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Weekly Update – Coinbase Outage, Prediction Markets, BlackRock on Ethereum & Stablecoin Yield Wars
item.description: <![CDATA[This week, Graham Stone and Alex Richardson break down the biggest stories in crypto, from Coinbase’s AWS-related outage to signs of risk appetite returning across Bitcoin, altcoins and NFTs.They also dig into the rise of prediction markets, how TradFi giants are moving into event contracts, BlackRock’s push to tokenize money market funds on Ethereum, and why stablecoin yield has become one of the key political fights in U.S. crypto regulation.Plus, Robert Kiyosaki is back with another doomer warning — this time about baby boomers facing severe financial pressure.Topics covered:• Coinbase outage and crypto infrastructure risk• Bitcoin, altcoins and NFTs catching bids• Prediction markets, manipulation and TradFi adoption• BlackRock tokenized money market funds on Ethereum• Stablecoin yield, banks and U.S. Treasury demand• Robert Kiyosaki’s warning for baby boomers00:30 - Market Updates: S&P 500, NASDAQ, Bitcoin01:29 - Altcoins and NFT Market Trends02:11 - Coinbase Outage Explanation03:03 - Technical Details of the Outage05:27 - Public Reaction and Speculation07:20 - Prediction Markets and Traditional Finance09:31 - ETFs and Crypto Legislation12:29 - BlackRock's Tokenized Funds15:13 - Clarity Act and Crypto Regulation19:25 - Robert Kiyosaki's Predictions]]>

item.title: VERIFIED by Bitcoin Suisse – Can Bitcoin Escape the Quantum Black Hole?
item.description:
Is quantum computing Bitcoin's biggest hidden risk - and is anyone actually solving it? In this episode, Dominic Weibel and Luca Gnos sit down with Charles Edwards, founder of Capriole Investments, to break down how geopolitics, macro conditions, and quantum risk are shaping Bitcoin's next move. Edwards shares his onchain valuation tools pointing to a ~43% discount from fair value, explains why institutions now dominate Bitcoin's demand structure, and makes the case that quantum risk is already suppressing price - with a potential major repricing on the horizon within 12–24 months.

]]>
item.itunes:summary:

Edwards shares his onchain valuation tools pointing to a ~43% discount from fair value, explains why institutions now dominate Bitcoin's demand structure, and makes the case that quantum risk is already suppressing price - with a potential major repricing on the horizon within 12–24 months.

item.title: Krypto Corner – Bitcoin, ETF und NFT: Sicher investieren - Krypto verstehen und sicher starten – Bonus zu Kap. 33 Warum Bitcoin kein schwarzer Schwan ist (Staffelfinale)
item.description:
Der wilde Westen schließt seine Pforten, die Revolution wird zum Alltag. In dieser 20-minütigen Bonus-Analyse feiern unsere KI-Moderatoren das große Finale der ersten Staffel. Der Krypto-Winter taut endlich auf und der März bringt die ersten warmen Sonnenstrahlen in die Berliner WG-Küche. Tom hat überlebt – er ist seine eigene Bank geworden, hat den Steuer-Dschungel durchquert und die Gier endgültig besiegt.


Wir blicken auf Toms Transformation vom getriebenen Anfänger zum souveränen Investor zurück. Außerdem erklären wir dir das Konzept des "Weißen Schwans": Das unausweichliche Eintreffen der Wall Street und der institutionellen Gelder im Krypto-Space. Wer jetzt sein Fundament aus Beton gegossen hat, hat sich positioniert, bevor die breiten Massen kommen – und ist bereit für das nächste Level.


Das absolute Highlight: Ein erster epischer Ausblick auf Band 2! Wir teasern an, wie du dich im neuen Bullenmarkt positionierst, wie du die Wall-Street-Giganten auf der Blockchain ausspionierst und wie du die komplexen Steuerfallen der neuen Regulierungen meisterst.


Die Highlights dieser Bonus-Analyse:


  • Die Metamorphose: Vom nervösen Zocker zum eiskalten Strategen.



  • Der Weiße Schwan: Warum die Ankunft der Wall Street das vorhersehbarste Event der Finanzgeschichte ist.



  • Die Früchte des Winters: Warum sich die harte Arbeit an Wallets und Steuer-Tools jetzt auszahlt.


Der Ton dieser Episode ist ruhig, befreiend, philosophisch und am Ende extrem triumphal und motivierend!


🚀 BUCH-RELEASE & STAFFEL-FINALE: Schließe Band 1 ab mit „Krypto verstehen – sicher starten“ und mach dich bereit für Band 2!


🔥 EXKLUSIVE BUCH-PREVIEW: Dieser Podcast bietet dir einen exklusiven Einblick in das Standardwerk der Krypto-Welt. Das geballte Wissen der ersten Staffel – von allen Checklisten über die Sicherheitsarchitektur bis hin zu den Steuer-Strategien – kannst du nun in Ruhe nachschlagen. „Krypto verstehen – sicher starten“ (Band 1) von Sascha Swen Heiter ist ab sofort überall erhältlich!


⚖️ Rechtlicher Hinweis & Haftungsausschluss (ESSENZIELL): Sämtliche Inhalte dieses Podcasts dienen ausschließlich der allgemeinen Information und Unterhaltung. Alle Angaben erfolgen ohne Gewähr.

  • Keine Beratung: Dieser Podcast stellt zu keinem Zeitpunkt eine Anlageberatung, Rechtsberatung oder Steuerberatung dar.

  • Eigenverantwortung: Krypto-Investments sind hochriskant und können zum Totalverlust führen. Jeder Hörer handelt auf eigene Gefahr und Verantwortung.

  • Steuern & Recht: Die steuerliche Behandlung von Kryptowährungen ist hochkomplex. Bitte konsultiere zwingend einen qualifizierten Steuerberater für die aktuelle Rechtslage in der DACH-Region (Deutschland, Österreich, Schweiz) für die Jahre 2025/2026.

  • Haftung: Eine Haftung für Schäden, die aus der Nutzung der hier bereitgestellten Informationen entstehen, wird ausdrücklich ausgeschlossen.

Basiert auf dem Buch von Sascha Swen Heiter. Wir hören uns in der nächsten Staffel!


#Bitcoin #Finanzen #KryptoCorner #Geldanlage #Blockchain #SaschaSwenHeiter #Krypto #Crypto #DACH #Investieren2026 #Staffelfinale #WhiteSwan #WallStreet #ETFs #BonusFolge


]]>

item.title: BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin und Deutschland: Wo stehen wir und wo kann die Reise hingehen? #6 mit Larry
item.description:
Herzlich willkommen zum BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast(https://www.bitbucks.de)!

Heute haben wir einen besonderen Gast: Larry, bekannt als @B1tcoin3r auf X. Larry ist ein erfahrener Bitcoin-Experte, Vortragsredner und Workshop-Host. Dank seines weitreichenden Netzwerks in führenden Positionen bringt er tiefgehende Einblicke in die aktuelle Bitcoin-Situation in Deutschland mit. Gemeinsam sprechen wir über die deutsche Bitcoin-Politik, die Auswirkungen der neuen Regierung und die mögliche Zukunft von Bitcoin in Deutschland.

Viel Spaß beim Zuhören!

Zudem reden wir auch noch über die Themen:

- Die aktuelle Bitcoin Lage in Deutschland (Adaption, Beliebtheit)

- Lösungen für eine Bitcoin Adaption

- Einfluss der Politik auf Bitcoin

- Ob Bitcoin die Politik überhaupt braucht- Bitcoin und Unternehmen bzw. Start-Ups

- Wie viele Jahre es dauern wird, bis Deutschland Bitcoin als offizielles Zahlungsmittel einführt

- Bitcoin Städte Spiel: Errate die fünf beliebtesten Bitcoin Städte weltweit

- Wie Bitcoin Larrys Leben verändert hat

- Glaskugel: Bitcoin Preis am Ende des Jahres 2025Podcast Folge auf Spotify:

---------------------------------------------------------------------

Mehr Infos zu BitBucks: Webseite:

https://www.bitbucks.de/Apple Download: https://apps.apple.com/de/app/bitcoin-wallet-bitbucks/id1453167599

Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.fuf.bitbucks&pli=1

https://www.instagram.com/bit_bucks/

https://www.linkedin.com/company/bitbucks/

https://www.tiktok.com/@bitbucks

https://x.com/bit_bucksPodcast auf Spotify:

https://open.spotify.com/show/0bhDawE23ld6lPw7KnqUH5?si=5182b2525e7144db

----------------------------------------------------------------------

Vernetz dich gerne mit den Rednern :)

LinkedIn Konsti Schwemlein: https://www.linkedin.com/in/konstantin-schwemlein/

X/Twitter Larry: https://x.com/B1tcoin3r

--------------------------------------------------------------

TimeStamps:

00:00 Intro

01:15 Wie bist du zu Bitcoin gekommen?

03:20 Wie steht es um Bitcoin in Deutschland?

07:45 Thema Bitcoin: Bevölkerung vs. Unternehmen/Politik

12:46 Was sind deine Verbesserungsvorschläge?

15:15 Wie kann die deutsche Politik Bitcoin integrieren?

17:28 Gleicht eine Bitcoin Reserve die Staatsschulden aus?

19:50 Wird eine CDU Regierung das Thema Bitcoin fördern?

22:38 Warum setzen sich die Grünen nicht für Bitcoin ein?

27:18 Warum gibt es nicht mehr Bitcoin Unternehmen?

30:12 Braucht Bitcoin die Politik überhaupt?

33:15 Wann wird Bitcoin in DE gesetzliches Zahlungsmittel?

42:24 Spiel: Die 5 Städte mit der höchsten Bitcoin Adaption

47:20 Wie hat Bitcoin dein Leben verändert?

52:25 Wo steht der Bitcoin Preis Ende 2025?

57:20 Outro

item.title: All In Bitcoin – 031 Jameson Lopp: Why We Choose Convenience Over Freedom (Nostr, Privacy & Bitcoin) I All in Bitcoin w/CK
item.description:
🎙️ Jameson Lopp: Why We Choose Convenience Over Freedom (Nostr, Privacy & Bitcoin)

Freedom is being traded for convenience, and most people don’t even notice.

In Part 2 with Jameson Lopp, we go deep into freedom tech, privacy tools, censorship-resistant communication, and the future of digital sovereignty.

Jameson explains why convenience is the easiest way to lose freedom, why tools like Signal, GrapheneOS, Linux, Bitcoin, and Nostr matter, and why freedom tech only wins if people actually use it.

We also discuss Telegram vs Signal, Nostr beyond “just another Twitter,” Bitcoin self-custody, ETFs, privacy, and the growing risks of centralization.

This is a conversation about liberty, communication, responsibility, and the tools we may need before it’s too late.

👇 ORDER YOUR BITBOX 02 NOVA BITCOIN ONLY HARDWARE WALLET WITH 5% DISCOUNT

https://bitbox.swiss/allinbitcoin or use Code ALLINBITCOIN

👉 Follow, like , subscribe and tap the bell to All in Bitcoin for more unfiltered conversations that go where others won’t. 🎧 Available on YouTube, Spotify, Apple, Nostr, and everywhere you listen:

https://linktr.ee/allinbitcoin

👇FOLLOW JAMESON´S WORK:

Nostr: lopp@lopp.net

X: @lopp

https://www.lopp.net

👇FOLLOW CK & ALL IN BITCOIN:

Nostr: allinbitcoin@primal.net 

        [allinbitcoin@iris.to](mailto:allinbitcoin@iris.to)   

        [allinbitcoin@nostrplebs.com](mailto:allinbitcoin@nostrplebs.com)

X: @allinbitcoinpod

TIMESTAMPS:

0:00 Introduction

1:38 Defining liberty and property rights

3:16 How freedoms are taken away today

7:35 Defending liberty

13:41 Best freedom tools and personal privacy

17:12 Libertarian myth

22:40 Nostr: decentralized communication protocol

36:38 Biggest doubt about freedom tech adoption

49:03 Bitcoin ETFs Are Recreating Mt. Gox

DISCLAIMER:All views expressed by me or my guests are solely our own opinions. You should not treat any opinions expressed in this podcast as a specific endorsement to make a particular investment or follow a particular strategy, but only as an expression of personal opinion. This podcast is for informational purposes only. It does not constitute financial, legal, or political advice, and it does not promote or oppose any political party, candidate, or campaign. This podcast may contain speculation, or interpretation. We encourage listeners to do their own research and verify information independently.

item.title: BTC-ECHO Recap | Top-Stories zu Bitcoin & Kryptowährungen – Wir sind umgezogen!
Bitcoin Audible – Chat_167 - Why Your Keys Matter with Seed
item.description:
"If you think of River or Gemini or Coinbase or whatever, think of all of those as silos and how people custody Bitcoin. If some sort of compromise were to come into the Bitcoin ecosystem at the private key generation level, that could create an incident that could set Bitcoin back by 10 or more years because it would be almost indistinguishable from a protocol compromise and that we would be talking about Bitcoin being hacked again and not individual custodians being hacked. So I think we need to decentralise how people do Bitcoin custody as much as possible and what better way by leveraging private freedom preserving open source software."

~ Seed

In today’s chat, I sat down with Seed, the creator of the SeedSigner project, and his backstory is completely wild.

He told the story of how he got pulled into Bitcoin through a forensic case tied to a local Silk Road user, why he panic sold in 2017, and how that path eventually led him back to the basics and into building one of the most respected DIY signers in the space. But the real tension in this episode is the part most people skip over: what actually keeps your coins safe when things get messy in the real world.

We talk about the grim reality of wrench attacks, what actually happens when law enforcement flips a house upside down with a search warrant, and how a former forensics cop secures his own wealth. If you think a standard hardware wallet hidden in a sock drawer is enough, hearing his threat models might completely rewrite your long-term storage plans. And yes, we got into a few stories that made me think about my own setup a lot differently.

Guest Links

  • Seed on X (Link: https://x.com/sesi_the_man)
  • SeedSigner on X (Link: https://x.com/SeedSigner)
  • Today in Bitcoin History on X (Link: https://x.com/daily_btc_lore)
  • SeedSigner's Website (Link: https://seedsigner.com/)

Affiliate Links

  • Become sovereign, hold your keys, be censorship resistant with the Bitbox hardware wallet. Get 5% off everything in the store with code GUY (Link: https://bitbox.swiss/)
  • Get ⁠10% off the COLDCARD⁠ with code BITCOINAUDIBLE ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠(Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/coldcard)

  • (Under construction) Check out the list of products and services I use and recommend on BitcoinAudible.com (Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/)

Host Links

]]>

item.title: Bald in Bitcoin – Bald in Bitcoin - Folge 12: Warum sparen Dich nicht mehr schützt
item.description:
Thema der Folge

In dieser Folge geht es um die Frage, warum klassisches Sparen heute nicht mehr automatisch schützt.

Früher konnten Sparer oft reale Kaufkraft aufbauen, weil die Zinsen oberhalb der Inflation lagen. Heute ist das häufig anders. Viele Menschen sehen zwar weiterhin stabile Zahlen auf dem Konto, verlieren aber schleichend Kaufkraft.

Kerngedanken Sparen ist nicht falsch, aber es schützt heute nicht mehr automatisch. Entscheidend ist nicht der nominale Kontostand, sondern die Kaufkraft. Zinsen müssen immer im Verhältnis zur Inflation betrachtet werden. Offizielle Inflation ist ein Durchschnitt, aber nicht unbedingt deine persönliche Realität. Ein Bankkonto fühlt sich sicher an, kann aber real Kaufkraft verlieren. Bitcoin ist für viele Menschen der Versuch, Wert langfristig zu speichern. Bitcoin kann als Werttransport über Zeit und Raum verstanden werden. Zentrale Sätze aus der Folge

„Das System hat sich verändert, aber unser Denken nicht.“

„Zinsen sind das, was du bekommst. Inflation ist das, was du verlierst.“

„Inflation ist immer persönlich. Nicht das, was in der Statistik steht, sondern das, was bei dir im Alltag passiert.“

„Wir verwechseln Stabilität mit Sicherheit.“

„Bitcoin ist kein schneller Gewinn. Es ist eine Möglichkeit, Wert zu bewahren – über Generationen hinweg.“

Vor-Ort Kurs Hinweis: Am 30.05.2026 findet mein Vor-Ort-Kurs statt: Bitcoin für Einsteiger – digitales Geld für analog Geborene Für alle, die Bitcoin ruhig, verständlich und ohne Fachchinesisch verstehen möchten. Link: https://bitucation.com/kurs/vor-ort-bitcoin-fuer-einsteiger-digitales-geld-fuer-analog-geborene/

Ausblick

In der nächsten Folge geht es darum, warum der Staat dieses Geldsystem sogar braucht – und warum sich daran so schnell nichts ändern wird.

]]>

item.title: No Second Best - A Bitcoin Podcast – Did the Federal Reserve Just Open the Door to Bitcoin?
item.description:
Jamie Dimon just went on national television to push back against Bitcoin and crypto legislation. Hours later, a Bitcoin exchange gained direct access to the Federal Reserve's settlement rails.

At the same time, Morgan Stanley filed for a spot Bitcoin ETF while geopolitical tensions escalated in the Middle East and Bitcoin surged.

This episode breaks down the growing conflict between the traditional banking system and the emerging Bitcoin financial infrastructure, and why the global monetary system may already be bending toward neutral, hard money.

]]>

item.title: Thank God for Bitcoin – To The Unknown Pod Episode 42: Bitcoin and A World At War
item.description:
In this episode, Jordan Bush and Ryan Finlay explore the complex intersections of global conflict, economic warfare, and Bitcoin's role as a resilient alternative in a world at war. They analyze recent Middle East tensions, the decline of the petrodollar, and how Bitcoin offers a form of financial sovereignty amidst geopolitical chaos.

]]>

item.title: Der Relai Bitcoin Podcast – Warum Bitcoin mehr als nur Geld ist, mit Markus Huersch | Relai Bitcoin Podcast #120
item.description:
Markus Huersch ist der Autor des Buches “21 good reasons, weil Bitcoin viel mehr ist als nur Geld” und begeisterter Bitcoiner. Der Grund fürs Buch ist schon mehr als 20 Jahre alt, als Markus in seiner früheren Tätigkeit Interviews und Dokumentationen überall auf der Welt plante. 

Im Gespräch mit Relais Joël Kai Lenz erzählt Markus von seiner Erfahrung in der Filmbranche, wie er zu Bitcoin kam, weshalb er schon immer mit dem Auto nach Südafrika wollte und wie er das verbunden hat, um ein Bitcoin-Buch zu schreiben. 

Du findest Markus’ Buch hier: https://21goodreasons.com/ 

Und schreibe ihn an, falls du Fragen hast: https://markushuersch.com/ 

—

⏱ Kapitel:

00:00 - Intro und Vorstellung

01:59 - Wie Markus mit der Idee des Buches aufkam

07:19 - Was bedeutet Bitcoin für Markus heute? 

09:15 - Bitcoin in Afrika, wie es Markus erlebt hat

13:00 - Werbepause für die Relai-App und Dienste

18:11 - Wie Markus seine Buchmomente nochmals durchlebt

21:00 - Was interessiert Markus heute in der Bitcoin Welt?

24:10 - Sehen wir dann auch bald schon einen 21 good reasons Film?

28:05 - Was kann Relai in der Bitcoin Bildung noch besser machen?

30:20 - Orangepillt Markus noch heute Leute oder lässt er es lieber sein?

33:16 - Markus’ Bitcoin-Position in seinem Portfolio

—

Willst du dir die Sendung lieber anhören? 

🎧Auf Apple Podcast anhören: 

https://podcasts.apple.com/at/podcast/der-relai-bitcoin-podcast/id1543240691 

🎧Auf Spotify anhören: 

https://open.spotify.com/show/4nwQa2HLv2d9GHnGm6GpoO?si=2bd070927706437d 

—

Die in der Sendung geäusserten Meinungen sind die Meinungen der einzelnen Gäste und geben nicht unbedingt die Meinung der Relai AG wieder. Die Informationen im Podcast können ohne Vorankündigung geändert werden, und es wird nicht garantiert, dass sie richtig, vollständig oder aktuell sind.

—

🎓 Lerne Bitcoin besser kennen:

🧠 Kostenloser Bitcoin-Kurs: https://relai.app/de/21-bitcoin-basics/

📥 Kostenloser wöchentlicher Bitcoin-Newsletter: https://relai.app/de/newsletter

👀 Brauchst du Hilfe? Stell uns eine Frage: https://support.relai.app/de

Folge uns:

Instagram: https://instagram.com/relai.app

Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/relai_app

LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/relai

Haftungsausschluss: Relai ist gemäss dem MiCA-Regulierungsrahmen berechtigt, Krypto-Asset-Dienstleistungen in der Schweiz und in der gesamten Europäischen Union anzubieten. Nach Abschluss der Passporting-Verfahren baut das Unternehmen seine Dienstleistungen aktiv auf weitere EU-Mitgliedstaaten aus.

#Bitcoin #Finanzen #Investieren #RelaiApp #SwissBitcoin #StackSats #21BitcoinBasics #BitcoinWissen

]]>

item.title: 21Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast – Aus der Banken IT in die Welt von Bitcoin - Harald Betz
item.description:
Folge #61 – Ein Gespräch über Banken IT und Bitcoin Bücher

Harald Beetz ist seit fast 20 Jahren selbstständig in der Beratung für Banken und Rechenzentren. Angefangen als Banklehrling bei der Sparkasse, hat er früh den Wandel von Beratung hin zu reinem Vertrieb erlebt und sich auf IT-Projekte spezialisiert. In diesem Gespräch erzählt er, wie er von der Banken IT zu Bitcoin kam, warum er mit seiner Frau einen Roman über Geld schrieb und wie er sich heute zwischen Beratung und Content rund um Bitcoin positioniert.


Du erfährst,

  • wie Harald die Bankenwelt von innen erlebt hat,
  • welche Herausforderungen und Chancen es als IT-Berater gibt,
  • warum er Bitcoin zunächst wieder verkaufte und später mit völlig anderem Blick neu entdeckte,
  • wie aus einer Buchidee seiner Frau ein gemeinsames Projekt wurde
  • und welche unternehmerischen Lektionen er aus fast zwei Jahrzehnten Selbstständigkeit mitnimmt.


Kapitel:

  • 00:00 Begrüßung und Vorstellung
  • 02:15 Vom Banklehrling zum IT-Berater
  • 07:40 Veränderungen in der Bankenwelt seit den 2000er Jahren
  • 15:10 Einstieg in die Selbstständigkeit und erste Projekte
  • 22:05 Gescheiterte Produktidee und der Wechsel zur Beratung
  • 29:15 Erster Kontakt mit Bitcoin und die zweite Begegnung
  • 36:50 Der Roman über Geld und Bitcoin
  • 44:20 Zukunft der Beratung im Banken- und Bitcoin-Umfeld
  • 49:00 Wichtigste Tipps für Vertrieb und Resilienz


Links:

Youtube: youtube.com/@MiesesGeld

Webseite: miesesgeld.de

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/haraldbetz


---

21 Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast

Hallo, mein Name ist Daniel Wingen und ich suche den Austausch mit anderen Unternehmern die in Bitcoin eine wichtiges Werkzeug für ihr Unternehmen sehen. Ich möchte selbst lernen und andere dazu inspirieren sich mit Bitcoin im eigenen Unternehmen zu beschäftigen.

Hier kannst Du Teil der Community werden und mich kontaktieren:

Telegram Community: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠t.me/B21Focus⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ 

Daniel auf X: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠x.com/danielwingen⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ 

Daniel auf LinkedIn:⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ linkedin.com/in/danielwingen/⁠

]]>

item.title: bitcoin ist - Wissen statt FOMO – 17) ... die Trennung von Geld und Privileg
item.description:
Warum geht die Schere zwischen Arm und Reich immer weiter auf, obwohl wir in einer Zeit des globalen Wachstums leben? Es gibt viele Gründe. Aber unser eigenes Geld ist bevorteilt strukturell eine privilegierte Schicht von Menschen!

In dieser Folge tauchen wir ein in den Cantillon-Effekt. Ein Mechanismus, der fast unsichtbar im Hintergrund arbeitet und dafür sorgt, dass neues Geld niemals alle gleichzeitig erreicht. Wer nah an der Quelle sitzt, profitiert; wer weit weg ist, zahlt die Zeche durch steigende Preise.

Was dich in dieser Folge erwartet:

  • Das Champagner-Gleichnis: Wie sich frisches Geld in einer Pyramide verteilt und warum die unteren Gläser oft leer ausgehen.

  • Richard Cantillon: Was ein Goldminenbesitzer aus dem 18. Jahrhundert uns über unser heutiges Fiat-Geldsystem lehren kann.

  • Systemische Benachteiligung: Warum deine Kaufkraft schwindet, noch bevor die Gehaltserhöhung auf dem Konto ankommt.

  • Bitcoin als Antwort: Warum Bitcoin Privilegien abbaut und wie ein System ohne Zentralbank den Cantillon-Effekt fast vollständig eliminiert.

Erfahre, warum Bitcoin weit mehr ist als nur ein neues Asset. Es ist der Versuch, Geld und Privileg zum ersten Mal in der modernen Geschichte voneinander zu trennen.

Du hast Interesse bitcoin zu kaufen, weisst aber nicht genau wie? Hol dir meinen kostenlosen Leitfaden als Download !

🔗 https://tinyurl.com/45rpsjuc

Folge mir auf Instagram/WhatsApp/Telegram für mehr "Wissen statt Fomo" zum Thema Bitcoin.

Alle Links

🔗 www.linktr.ee/bitcoinist

Hat dir die Folge gefallen? Dann abonniere den Podcast und hinterlasse eine Bewertung. Das hilft mir enorm, Wissen über Bitcoin zu verbreiten!

Bleib dran, dein Christian.

]]>

item.title: Kryptohelden - Bitcoin, Ethereum & Co meistern - ohne Hektik! – Aufbau eines Web3-Startups: Erkenntnisse vom Gründer von Li.fi mit Philipp Zentner
item.description:
Inhalt
  • Vorstellung von Philipp Zentner und Li.fi
  • Unterschiede zwischen Web2 und Web3 und Anpassung von Geschäftsmodellen an das Web3-Ökosystem
  • Identifizierung von Nischen und Marktbedürfnissen in Web3 im Vergleich zu Web2
  • Aufbau eines starken Teams und Unterschiede bei der Suche und Bindung von Talenten in Web2 und Web3
  • Schaffung einer kollaborativen und innovativen Unternehmenskultur
  • Finanzierung eines Web3-Startups und Unterschiede bei der Finanzierung zwischen Web2 und Web3
  • Tokenomics und regulatorische Überlegungen im Web3-Umfeld
  • Erfahrungen und Herausforderungen beim Marketing und Community-Aufbau von Li.fi
  • Erkenntnisse und Tipps für diejenigen, die ihre eigenen Web3-Unternehmen gründen möchten
  • Zusammenfassung der wichtigsten Punkte und kommende Meilensteine für Li.fi
  • Abschließende Gedanken und Worte der Ermutigung für das Publikum.

Weiterführende Links

  • https://jumper.exchange/
  • https://twitter.com/PhilippZentner
  • https://philippzentner.com/
  • https://li.fi/
  1. Abonniere den Podcast iOS / Android / Spotify
